reason: Approved design defines config, status, continuation, brainstorm, behavior writeback, and auto-mode scope.
Implementation must follow steps in order and update step status.
Requirement explains user-visible control-plane capability and boundaries.
Current shared conventions own directory structure, status lifecycle, and handoff rules.
Onboard template copy must stay synchronized with current shared conventions for managed content.
Root router must read config and route continuation requests by artifact state.
Feature entry must resume unfinished features deterministically.
Acceptance must materialize stable behavior deltas into existing fact layers.
